headline: Crimson Tide Pods: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Crimson Tide Pods carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 65.45, led by DeVonta Smith, Alec Pierce, and Justin Herbert. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Jerry Jeudy at 49.1 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are DeVonta Smith (87.5), Alec Pierce (75.1), and Justin Herbert (72.2).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jerry Jeudy is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.1. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 66.55.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
